message:
fix: empty/bare-text retries no longer consume tool rounds

Model glitches (empty responses, bare text without tool calls) triggered
steering retries that consumed rounds from the agent's budget. In
transcripts, agents would hit the turn limit early because 30-40% of
their rounds were wasted on recovery from model glitches rather than
actual tool use.

Add round-- before continue in both retry paths, matching the existing
pause_turn pattern. Retries still happen and are still capped, but they
no longer eat into MaxToolRoundsPerInput.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
